subject: [PATCH v3 3/3] mm/huge_memory: skip device-private PMDs in madvise_free_huge_pmd

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand (Arm)
reviews.summary: Acknowledged the patch and gave it an Acked-by tag without raising any specific technical concerns or suggestions.

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand (Arm)
reviews.summary: Repeated the Acked-by tag without raising any specific technical concerns or suggestions.

2026-07-10.patch_summary: This patch series addresses a potential double-put bug in the huge_memory code, specifically when dealing with device-private PMDs (Page Map Entries) in madvise_free_huge_pmd(). The fix involves skipping these PMDs in a non-present branch and downgrading the check to a warning instead of panicking. This change also removes an unnecessary guard related to THP migration support.
